product_overview: A unified dashboard that aggregates business messages from multiple sources into actionable tasks, lets users resolve identities across sources, and generates visual reports (Sankey and top-entity views) to track work flow and ownership.
core_goals: See and act on incoming messages consolidated as tasks from multiple sources
Filter and prioritize tasks by source, category, and assignee
Mark tasks as done and review archived messages
Search and link contact identities across sources to resolve who sent/owns a message
Generate date-scoped reports and visualizations (Sankey, top entities) to understand requester–worker relationships

features.name: Dashboard Task Management
features.description: Browse consolidated messages presented as tasks, filter results, view task details and original message content, and mark tasks as done to archive them.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Toggle filters (Source, Category, Assignee) to narrow the task list -> View the filtered list of tasks -> View task details and original message -> Mark a task as done -> See task removed from the active list -> Navigate to /archive -> See the task present in archived messages
Navigate to / -> View the main task list -> Mark a task as done -> See task count or list update to reflect the change

features.name: Identity-X Contact Linking
features.description: Search across connected contact sources and link separate contact records into a single identity to unify message authors/assignees.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open contact search -> Search and select two contacts to link -> Link the selected contacts -> See the linked identity associated with the contact record
Navigate to / -> Open contact search -> Select only one contact -> Attempt to link contacts -> See a validation message instructing to select two contacts to proceed

features.name: AI Reporting & Visualization
features.description: Generate AI-assisted business reports and visualizations (including Sankey charts) for a chosen date range to surface top entities and relationships.
user_flows: Navigate to /insights -> Select date range for report -> Generate report -> View Sankey chart and top entities
Navigate to /insights -> Generate report without changing the date range -> View Sankey chart and top entities

features.name: Dashboard Task Management
features.description: View, filter, and mark tasks as done.
user_interactions: View task details and original message

features.name: Identity-X Contact Linking
features.description: Search and link contacts from different sources.

features.name: AI Reporting & Visualization
features.description: Generate and view business intelligence reports with charts.
user_interactions: View Sankey chart and top entities
